name: Solid Power, Inc.
business: Solid Power develops and produces sulfide-based solid electrolyte materials for solid-state batteries. It sells electrolyte to battery manufacturers and automotive OEMs and licenses its cell manufacturing technology. The target market is electric vehicles.

exposures.sentence: Our core technology is a sulfide-based solid electrolyte material, which replaces the liquid or gel electrolyte used in traditional lithium-ion battery cells.
We are currently targeting the battery electric vehicle (EV) market due to the size and perceived demand for next generation battery technology.

catalysts.sentence: By the end of 2026, we expect to commission a pilot electrolyte line using a continuous manufacturing process.

catalysts.event: Complete site acceptance testing of SK On Line
catalysts.sentence: We have substantially completed the deliverables for site acceptance testing of the SK On Line and expect site acceptance to be complete in the first quarter of 2026.
We expect the JDA will expire by its terms on March 31, 2026.

catalysts.event: Received net proceeds from registered direct offering
catalysts.sentence: In January 2026, we received net proceeds of $122.2 million, after deducting fees and before expenses, from a registered direct offering.
